# cryptopunks open source

> A minimal, non-custodial reference client for the CryptoPunks ecosystem. Look up any punk or address, render its onchain SVG straight from CryptopunksData, and place / withdraw / accept bids and offers from a connected wallet.

This repo is a template — fork it, point it at your own RPC, and ship. Reads are proxied through `/api/rpc` so RPC keys stay server-side; writes are signed in the user's browser via RainbowKit + wagmi and broadcast directly to the canonical contracts. Not the official marketplace — for real trading use cryptopunks.app.

Stack: Next.js 16 (App Router) · React 19 · wagmi 2.x · RainbowKit 2.x · viem 2.x · Tailwind 4 · Vitest.

## Docs

- [README](/README.md): What's in here, quick start, architecture, deploying
- [AGENTS](/AGENTS.md): Onboarding for AI coding agents — Next.js 16 quirks, architecture invariants, visual conventions, pinned deps
- [CONTRIBUTING](/CONTRIBUTING.md): Why outside contributions aren't accepted, plus version-pin reasoning
- [SECURITY](/SECURITY.md): How to report a security issue
- [/docs](/docs): In-app setup guide (RPC_URL, WalletConnect project ID)

## Code

- [app/lib/cryptopunks.ts](/app/lib/cryptopunks.ts): Contract addresses and ABIs (typed `as const`), plus `makeReadClient()`
- [app/lib/wallet.tsx](/app/lib/wallet.tsx): RainbowKit + wagmi provider and `useWallet()` hook
- [app/api/rpc/route.ts](/app/api/rpc/route.ts): Server-side JSON-RPC proxy that keeps `RPC_URL` private
- [app/components/PunkView.tsx](/app/components/PunkView.tsx): Per-punk page (state, onchain SVG, bids/sales)
- [app/components/AddressView.tsx](/app/components/AddressView.tsx): Per-address holdings, pending balance, stash address
- [app/components/AttributeView.tsx](/app/components/AttributeView.tsx): Per-attribute search and SVG grid
